prompts: Morale is collapsing. How do you answer the provinces?
The people mutter in the markets. What signal do you send?
Joy is thin this week. Choose how the crown responds.
Illness and fatigue are spreading. Choose a public-health response.
Healers report rising fever wards. How hard do you intervene?
Bodies are failing faster than spirits. Pick a remedy.
The land is failing. How hard do you pull back extraction?
Soil and streams look exhausted. Choose a stewardship path.
The ledger wants ore; the land wants rest. Decide.

cap_extraction.label: Cap extraction
cap_extraction.hint: Smaller env recovery; milder yield hit

prompts: This region is still under an active calamity. Reinforce, evacuate, or hold?
Disaster banners still fly here. How do you spend the week?
The crisis has not passed. Choose relief, retreat, or resolve.

evacuate_labor.label: Evacuate labor
evacuate_labor.hint: Move 15% of extractive workers out of the region’s jobs

hold_the_line.label: Hold the line
hold_the_line.hint: No change to the crisis response
